title: CreateSubscriptionRequest
description: Implementation of the 'CreateSubscriptionRequest' model. Request used to add a webhook subscription for the requesting developer

eventIds.description: The events you want to be sent to the specified `webhookUrl`.

eventSchemaVersion.description: The event schema version for this subscription. `1` is currently the only accepted value.

referenceId.description: An arbitrary field that you can set to a value of your choice. Mindbody stores and returns this value for the subscription you are creating. Most commonly, this field stores a GUID that you can use in your application.

webhookUrl.description: The URL that Mindbody posts the event notifications to. Webhook URL Requirements lists considerations and requirements for this URL.
